summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM application's new features: Two-step import modal, multi-contact system, and colored tags functionality. All major new features are working correctly with excellent implementation quality.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events in some scenarios, requiring force=True for clicks

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity (31/31 tests passed - all CRUD operations working)
Two-step Import Modal: Company/Visit selection working perfectly
Company Import: Template download and file upload functionality working
Visit Import: Customer selection requirement implemented correctly
Visit Import: Template download appears after customer selection
CustomerDetailCard: Opens correctly with all required buttons
Multi-Contact System: Contacts tab working with contact count display
Add Contact: Form appears and accepts new contact data
Contact Management: Add, delete, and set primary contact functionality working
CreatableSelect: Colored tags system fully functional with 71+ colored options
CreatableSelect: Auto-color assignment working (Test Dynamic Market shows orange background)
CreatableSelect: Backend API returns colored options correctly
Backup and Cloud export buttons present and accessible
All navigation and modal interactions working correctly
ContactPerson model integration working in backend
Similarity warnings system working in import preview

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (all new features working, minor modal overlay issue)
